success_criteria: Unit Test Coverage > 80% (General), > 95% (Financial/PII Modules); No Critical/High Static Analysis Issues (SonarQube); No Hardcoded Secrets detected
escalation_procedure: Notify Developer immediately via PR comment
business_impact: Prevents technical debt accumulation and security leaks early in the lifecycle.

success_criteria: Docker Image Build Success; Container Vulnerability Scan: 0 Critical, 0 High vulnerabilities; Dependency Audit (npm audit/pip audit): 0 Critical vulnerabilities
tools_used: Docker BuildKit, Trivy or Clair, npm audit
escalation_procedure: Fail CI Pipeline, Notify DevOps Lead
business_impact: Ensures no known vulnerabilities are introduced via dependencies or base images.

success_criteria: Integration Test Pass Rate: 100%; Database Migration Verification: Success; Financial Idempotency Tests: 100% Pass; Webhook Signature Verification: 100% Pass
business_impact: Validates service interoperability and critical financial logic stability.

success_criteria: PII Redaction Accuracy > 95% on test corpus; JSON Schema Validation Pass Rate > 98% for SOW Extraction; No leakage of prompt instructions
escalation_procedure: Notify AI Lead and Data Protection Officer
business_impact: Prevents GDPR violations and ensures data quality for vendor matching.

success_criteria: API Response Time (p95) < 250ms; SOW Processing Latency < 120s; Vector Search < 500ms; Error Rate < 1% under 1k concurrent users
business_impact: Guarantees system stability and responsiveness under expected load.

success_criteria: DAST Scan (OWASP ZAP): No High/Critical Alerts; Broken Access Control Tests: 100% Pass; Rate Limiting verification: Active
tools_used: OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite (Manual), Custom Auth Scripts
business_impact: Ensures compliance with SOC 2 and prevents data breaches.

success_criteria: Critical User Journeys (Invoice Payment, Proposal Submission) Verified; Zero Critical/Major UI Bugs; Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) Pass
business_impact: Validates business requirements and ensures a bug-free user experience.
